# Stock Availability

Acme Shop provides a clear stock availability feature on product pages, indicating whether items are "In Stock," "Low Stock," or "Out of Stock." Customers are encouraged to act quickly on low-stock items, and for out-of-stock products, a restock alert system is available. Setting up an alert is simple and free; customers can receive notifications via email or phone when the product is back in stock. However, alert registration does not guarantee item reservation, and restock timelines may vary due to supply chain factors.

[Source: product_information.md#stock-availability]
